overall.description: A first-person exploration sequence through a futuristic cyberpunk interior, likely from Cyberpunk 2077. The player walks through a dimly lit corporate gallery featuring holographic data displays, glowing red branching sculptures, and a massive glass wall revealing a preserved rocky garden with lush vegetation. The environment features teal and red neon lighting, reflective floors, and sleek modern architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic corporate gallery with nature display wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a dark futuristic corridor, observing the large glass wall with rocky terrain on the right and holographic displays on the left

entered.detail: massive transparent wall revealing a preserved rocky garden with lush greenery and boulders behind it
floating transparent screens showing financial charts and data visualizations in cyan light
glowing red coral-like sculptures with branching patterns placed on pedestals
dark polished surface reflecting the neon lights and holographic displays
tall vertical light strips glowing with warm light at the far end of the hall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking through a sleek, dark corporate interior. To the right, a massive glass wall reveals a preserved rocky garden with lush vegetation, while the left side features floating holographic data displays. Red glowing branching sculptures sit on pedestals along the path, and the reflective floor mirrors the teal and red neon lighting throughout the space.

scene_state.functional_zone: glass-enclosed nature observation area with rocky terrain

events.description: turns right to face the large glass wall, focusing on the rocky garden display behind it

agents.ego_description: turning to face the nature display, then walking alongside the glass wall to observe the rocky terrain and vegetation up close

entered.detail: large gray boulders and rock formations visible through the glass with detailed texture
rounded brown architectural element visible within the nature display behind the glass

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right to focus on the massive glass wall revealing a detailed rocky landscape with boulders and lush greenery. Moving along the glass, the view shows the texture of the rocks and hanging vines inside the enclosed nature display. The red branching sculptures now appear on the left as the perspective shifts, and the illuminated pillars remain visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: central corridor with holographic data terminals

events.description: turns left away from the glass wall to face back toward the interior corridor

agents.ego_description: turning back toward the interior, walking through the central hall while observing the holographic displays and red sculptures

entered.detail: large floating screens with cyan data visualizations and graphs

segments.scene_description: Turning away from the nature display, the view returns to the interior corridor with holographic data terminals on the left. The red branching sculptures now appear on the right side as the camera moves forward. The illuminated pillars at the far end grow larger in the frame, and the reflective floor continues to mirror the ambient teal lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: far end of gallery with illuminated architectural pillars

agents.ego_description: walking toward the far end of the hall, passing between the holographic displays and approaching the illuminated vertical pillars

entered.detail: decorative wall sections with geometric patterns and vertical lighting strips

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the approach to the far end of the gallery, with illuminated vertical pillars growing larger in the center of the frame. Textured wall panels with geometric patterns become visible on the left. The holographic displays shift to the right side as the camera moves past them, and the red branching structures fall behind as the camera advances toward the glowing pillars at the corridor's end.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a sleek corporate gallery that shifts from a wide exploration of holographic displays to a focused approach toward glowing architectural pillars. It begins by moving through a dark interior where floating data terminals on the left and red branching sculptures on the right are mirrored in the reflective teal and red floors. As the camera turns right, the perspective shifts to focus on a massive glass wall, gliding along a preserved rocky garden filled with boulders and hanging vines. The view then turns away from the nature display to return to the main corridor, where the red sculptures and holographic terminals swap sides as the camera advances. Finally, the scene narrows its focus toward the far end of the gallery, passing geometric wall panels as the illuminated vertical pillars grow larger in the frame.
